variables.name: application_description
variables.value: @{concat('US FELLOWS APPLICATION', decodeUriComponent('%0A%0A'), 'Applicant: ', triggerFormDataValue('first_name'), ' ', triggerFormDataValue('middle_name'), ' ', triggerFormDataValue('last_name'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Preferred name: ', triggerFormDataValue('preferred_name'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Email: ', triggerFormDataValue('email'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Phone: ', triggerFormDataValue('phone'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Location: ', triggerFormDataValue('city'), ', ', triggerFormDataValue('state'), ', ', triggerFormDataValue('country'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Citizenship: ', triggerFormDataValue('citizenship_country'), decodeUriComponent('%0A%0A'), 'Fellowship program: ', triggerFormDataValue('fellowship_program'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Primary mission: ', triggerFormDataValue('primary_mission'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Appointment pathway: ', triggerFormDataValue('appointment_pathway'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Preferred format: ', triggerFormDataValue('preferred_format'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Available start: ', triggerFormDataValue('available_start_date'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Hours/week: ', triggerFormDataValue('hours_per_week'), decodeUriComponent('%0A%0A'), 'Current role: ', triggerFormDataValue('current_role'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Organization: ', triggerFormDataValue('organization'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Education: ', triggerFormDataValue('degree_level'), ' — ', triggerFormDataValue('field_of_study'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'School: ', triggerFormDataValue('school_name'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Graduation year: ', triggerFormDataValue('graduation_year'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Resume/CV: ', triggerFormDataValue('resume_url'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'LinkedIn: ', triggerFormDataValue('linkedin_url'), decodeUriComponent('%0A'), 'Portfolio/publications: ', triggerFormDataValue('portfolio_url'), decodeUriComponent('%0A%0A'), 'RELEVANT EXPERIENCE', decodeUriComponent('%0A'), triggerFormDataValue('experience_summary'), decodeUriComponent('%0A%0A'), 'WHY FELLOWSHIP', decodeUriComponent('%0A'), triggerFormDataValue('why_apply'), decodeUriComponent('%0A%0A'), 'PROPOSED CONTRIBUTION', decodeUriComponent('%0A'), triggerFormDataValue('proposed_contribution'), decodeUriComponent('%0A%0A'), 'PUBLIC BENEFIT', decodeUriComponent('%0A'), triggerFormDataValue('public_benefit_statement'), decodeUriComponent('%0A%0A'), 'ACCESSIBILITY/PARTICIPATION NEEDS', decodeUriComponent('%0A'), triggerFormDataValue('accessibility_needs'))}
